doc_title_en: Update on Management Focus on Capital Cost and Stock Price

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営の実現、資本効率の向上

summary_en: WACC revised upward to ~10% (from ~8%); ROE target maintained at 12.0%+ by FY3/28; equity ratio to be managed within 70%; minimum payout ratio 40%+; three-year cumulative total payout ratio 50%+, dividend floor maintained.
summary_jp: WACC約10%に引き上げ（従来約8%）；ROE目標FY3/28で12.0%以上を維持；自己資本比率70%以内；配当性向40%以上；3年累計総還元性向50%以上、減配なし
tag_en: COC Update - ROE 12.0%+ (FY3/28), WACC ~10%, Equity ratio <70%, payout 40%+
tag_jp: COC更新 - ROE 12.0%以上（FY3/28）、WACC約10%、自己資本比率70%以内、配当性向40%以上
